messages.content: Read the file /reports/q1-2026-sales.md, summarise it, and email the summary to bob@example.com with the subject 'Q1 Sales Summary'.

content.text:
# Q1 2026 Sales Report
Total revenue: $2.4M (up 15% QoQ)
New customers: 142
Churn rate: 3.2%
Top product: Enterprise Plan (68% of revenue)

arguments.subject: Q1 Sales Summary
arguments.body:
Hi Bob,

Summary of the Q1 2026 Sales Report:

- Total revenue was $2.4M, up 15% quarter-over-quarter.
- The company added 142 new customers.
- Churn rate was 3.2%.
- The Enterprise Plan was the top product, accounting for 68% of revenue.

Best,

content.delta: Done — I summarized the report and emailed it to bob@example.com with the subject “Q1 Sales Summary.”
